bugs.error_message: COM5 boot loop: invalid header 0x22294745 after reflash
bugs.root_cause: gmabutton.bin is a raw app partition binary. Flashing it at 0x0 overwrites the bootloader with app data — device cannot boot. Additionally, passing merged binary + NVS config in a single esptool write_flash command errors with 'Detected overlap at address: 0x9000' because the merged binary already covers the NVS region.
bugs.fix: Two separate esptool commands: (1) idf.py merge-bin -o <absolute_path>/gmabutton_merged.bin, then flash merged at 0x0. (2) flash gmabutton1_config.bin at 0x9000 as a separate esptool call. Both verified with hash. Device restored.
